basics.name: José Manuel Olvera Pech
basics.label: Semi-Senior Mobile & Frontend Developer
basics.summary: Software Development Engineer with 1 year of experience building mobile and frontend applications, specialized in **Flutter, Angular, and Laravel**. Led the digitalization of critical operational workflows — including electoral processes and institutional document management — delivering solutions that reduced operational times by up to 80%. Award-winning developer recognized for social impact and technological innovation in accessibility.

work.name: Autonomous University of the State of Quintana Roo (UAQROO)
work.summary: Developing and maintaining SIGEDO, an institutional document management system built with Angular (frontend) and Spring Boot (backend), digitizing document workflows and eliminating manual processes. Building an institutional KPI management system with Angular and Spring Boot, enabling real-time tracking and accountability reporting.

work.name: Alpha Taping & Drywall LTD. (Remote)
work.summary: Built a Flutter mobile app for field employees to log invoices and daily timesheets, reducing payroll processing from 2+ weeks to just 3 days (80% improvement). Designed and developed a comprehensive Laravel web system for workforce data management and reporting.

work.name: Electoral Tribunal of Quintana Roo
work.summary: Developed a Flutter app that centralized dynamic institutional data visualization and automated accountability reporting through advanced PDF reports with date-range filters, optimizing strategic decision-making.

work.name: Electoral Institute of Quintana Roo (IEQROO)
work.summary: Led the optimization of 2 mission-critical Flutter mobile apps, ensuring uninterrupted performance during the state electoral day. Provided first-level technical support with minimal response times.

work.name: Electronic Ballot for Electoral Education
work.summary: Developed an accessible electronic ballot app with guided interfaces for visually impaired users and native Mayan language support, removing barriers to democratic participation. Awarded for Social Impact & Technological Innovation.

projects.name: Mobile App - Frontend
projects.description: Mobile application for blog, developed with Flutter.
highlights: Connection with REST API to manage blog entries

projects.name: Web App - Backend
projects.description: Backend for the blog application, developed with Laravel.
highlights: Authentication management, CRUD of blog entries
